subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the breeze that wafteth from the gardens of God's bounty! Let thy heart be moved thereby as though by wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المنجذب بنسیم هب من ریاض موهبه الله فتر نحت اعطافک منه کانه صهباء
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
